title: Attack attack on infrastructure
description: Report of Mykhailo Drapaty, Yevhenii Khmara and Pavel Palisa. The Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces reported on the situation at the front as a whole. We went through in detail those directions and tasks that require the most attention and operational solutions. In particular, we determined the order of our actions in response to Russian attacks on the infrastructure of our country, namely in response to Russian terror against our cities and communities...
description_en: Report of Mykhailo Drapaty, Yevhenii Khmara and Pavel Palisa. The Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces reported on the situation at the front as a whole. We went through in detail those directions and tasks that require the most attention and operational solutions. In particular, we determined the order of our actions in response to Russian attacks on the infrastructure of our country, namely in response to Russian terror against our cities and communities...
description_uk: Доповідь Михайла Драпатого, Євгенія Хмари і Павла Паліси. Головнокомандувач ЗСУ доповів по ситуації на фронті в цілому. Детально пройшлися по тих напрямках і завданнях, які потребують найбільшої уваги й оперативних рішень. Зокрема, визначили порядок наших дій у відповідь на російські удари по інфраструктурі нашої країни, а саме у відповідь на російський терор проти наших міст і громад...

title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Detailed information on the July 24, 2026 ballistic missile strike and the results of the combat operation. Around 11:30 am, the enemy struck Kyiv region with three Iskander-M/S-400 ballistic missiles from the north. As a result of combat work, the air defense managed to intercept one missile. Two rockets were hit in the Buchansky district of the Kyiv region. Our condolences to the families...
description_en: Detailed information on the July 24, 2026 ballistic missile strike and the results of the combat operation. Around 11:30 am, the enemy struck Kyiv region with three Iskander-M/S-400 ballistic missiles from the north. As a result of combat work, the air defense managed to intercept one missile. Two rockets were hit in the Buchansky district of the Kyiv region. Our condolences to the families...
description_uk: Уточнена інформація щодо удару балістичними ракетами 24 липня 2026 року та результатів бойової роботи Близько 11.30 ворог завдав удару по Київщині трьома балістичними ракетами Іскандер-М/С-400 з північного напрямку. В результаті бойової роботи одну ракету протиповітряній обороні вдалось перехопити. Зафіксовано влучання двох ракет в Бучанському районі на Київщині. Висловлюємо співчуття родинам...

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: A terrible tragedy happened today - the enemy launched a ballistic attack on an event organized by a private association of manufacturers 🚫 Brave1 was not an organizer or partner of the event. But this is a big loss for the industry. 🕯 We sincerely sympathize with every family that has lost loved ones. And we wish all the wounded a speedy recovery and strength to return to life. ✈️ Defense technology manufacturers are a constant target...

description_uk: Сьогодні сталася жахлива трагедія - ворог завдав удару балістикою по заходу, який організувала приватна асоціація виробників 🚫 Brave1 не був організатором чи партнером заходу. Але це велика втрата для індустрії. 🕯 Щиро співчуваємо кожній родині, яка втратила близьких. А усім пораненим бажаємо якнайшвидшого одужання та сил повернутися до життя. ✈️ Виробники оборонних технологій - це постійна ціль...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Military factory in Russia's Kirov in flames after reported Flamingo attack, local authorities report casualties. A major factory producing missile and aviation parts in the Russian city of Kirov was damaged in a Ukrainian Flamingo cruise missile strike that left six dead and dozens more injured, Russian and Ukrainian authorities as well as local media reported on July 24.
description_en: Military factory in Russia's Kirov in flames after reported Flamingo attack, local authorities report casualties. A major factory producing missile and aviation parts in the Russian city of Kirov was damaged in a Ukrainian Flamingo cruise missile strike that left six dead and dozens more injured, Russian and Ukrainian authorities as well as local media reported on July 24.
description_uk: Military factory in Russia's Kirov in flames after reported Flamingo attack, local authorities report casualties. A major factory producing missile and aviation parts in the Russian city of Kirov was damaged in a Ukrainian Flamingo cruise missile strike that left six dead and dozens more injured, Russian and Ukrainian authorities as well as local media reported on July 24.

title: Kyiv: Strike confirmed
description: A rescue operation is currently underway in the Kyiv region after the impact of Russian missiles. As of now, dozens of victims are known. It is also known that, unfortunately, six people died. My condolences to family and friends. Elucidation of all circumstances and the fate of people continues. All necessary services are available on site. There are victims in Sloviansk as a result of aerial bombardment. Five people were killed. My condolences to the family...

Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Продовжується з’ясування всіх обставин і долі людей. На місці працюють усі необхідні служби. Є постраждалі й у Слов’янську через удари авіабомбами. П’ять людей убито. Мої співчуття рідним....

title: Air defense active
description: An unknown drone once again flew into the airspace of Romania - it was shot down by an F-16. President Nikushor Dan said that the drone entered the airspace of the country around 11:00. The pilot opened fire over a deserted area, the wreckage is now being studied by experts. This is far from the first such case. In May, a Russian drone flew into a residential building in Galati, Romania, and injured two people. Total with...

title: Crimea: Drone strike
description: Wildberries logistics hubs in occupied Crimea, Russia's Tver catch fire after reported Ukrainian drone strikes. Logistics centers belonging to Russia's largest online retailer, Wildberries, came under fire in multiple regions amid reports of Ukrainian drone attacks targeting the facilities overnight on July 24.

title: Zaporizhzhia: 25 injured
description: At least 25 injured, including six children, in Russian strike on Zaporizhzhia. Russia struck the southern city of Zaporizhzhia with five guided aerial bombs on the evening of July 23, injuring at least 25 people, regional authorities said.
